title: Chewy Romantic Syrian Citrus Crumble
description: This citrusy dessert features a chewy base made with plant-based-friendly ingredients and topped with a creamy, aromatic crust.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons coconut sugar or maple syrup
2 lemons, juiced and zest added to the topping

instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Grease a 9x9 inch baking dish.
In a large mixing bowl, combine rolled oats, almond milk, orange zest, coconut sugar or maple syrup, and sea salt. Mix until well combined.
Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and bake for 25 minutes until set. Remove from oven and allow to cool slightly.
While the base is baking, prepare the topping. In a blender, combine coconut cream, fresh lemon juice, freshly squeezed lemons (zest included), and extra orange zest. Blend until smooth and creamy.
Pour the topping evenly over the cooled crust and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes or until golden brown. Let it cool to room temperature before serving.
